title: Bank of Japan keeps rates steady as expected, warns Iran war may push up inflation
summary_full: The Bank of Japan kept its rates steady at 0.75% as expected, but noted that inflation risks now are tilted to the upside due to the Iran war.
summary_public: The Bank of Japan kept its rates steady at 0.75% as expected, but noted that inflation risks now are tilted to the upside due to the Iran war.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: warns Iran war may push up inflation
